data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a temporary equipment loan during repair, as stated in the linked use case. However, while the use case mentions that a loaner mini-fridge is offered during repair, there is no concrete evidence provided that confirms this functionality has been implemented or tested through API reads or persisted state checks. This lack of direct evidence leads to a conclusion that there is a gap in satisfying the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming the implementation of the temporary equipment loan feature.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
